ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator responsible for the experiment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the round belongs to */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number within the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the round */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the round */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the round was conducted */,
  "experiment_version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment for which the round was conducted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rounds_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "random_id" TEXT /* Random identifier for the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the participant */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant gave consent to participate */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round the trial belongs to */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., sampling-task) */,
  "trial_index" INTEGER /* Index of the trial within the round */,
  "time_elapsed" INTEGER /* Time elapsed since the start of the round */,
  "internal_node_id" TEXT /* Internal node ID for the trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who completed the trial */,
  "trial_location" TEXT /* Location where the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  "trial_version" TEXT /* Version of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_number" INTEGER /* Sample number within the trial */,
  "sampling_type" TEXT /* Type of sampling (e.g., fixed) */,
  "n_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples taken */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the samples */,
  "feedback" INTEGER /* Feedback provided by the participant */,
  "stimulus" TEXT /* Stimulus presented to the participant */,
  "stimulus_colour" TEXT /* Colour of the stimulus */,
  "rt" INTEGER /* Response time in milliseconds */,
  "trial_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was taken */,
  "sample_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  "sample_version" TEXT /* Version of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the condition */,
  "condition_version" TEXT /* Version of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_conditions" (
  "trial_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial-condition mapping */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "condition_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial-condition mapping */,
  "condition_version" TEXT /* Version of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_conditions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_colour" TEXT /* Colour of the stimulus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_version" TEXT /* Version of the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_stimuli" (
  "trial_stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial-stimulus mapping */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial-stimulus mapping */,
  "stimulus_version" TEXT /* Version of the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_stimuli_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_stimuli_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the response belongs to */,
  "response_value" INTEGER /* Value of the response */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to provide the response */,
  "response_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the response */,
  "response_version" TEXT /* Version of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team to which the user belongs */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., error, info, warning) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the log entry was generated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the log entry was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
